title: T-009 — warehouse_settings table + 32 toggle defaults
prompt:
# T-009 — warehouse_settings table + toggle defaults

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §5.8, §16.1.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create `warehouse_settings` key-value table per §5.8 and seed all 32+ toggles from §16.1 with their PRD defaults.

## Implementation contract
Drizzle schema `packages/db/src/schema/warehouse-settings.ts`: id, tenant_id, warehouse_id (nullable for tenant-wide), setting_key VARCHAR(64), setting_value JSONB, marker VARCHAR(32) (UNIVERSAL/APEX-CONFIG/EVOLVING), updated_at/by. UNIQUE(tenant_id, warehouse_id, setting_key) (NULL warehouse_id treated as global).
Seed migration inserts the 32 keys from §16.1 with default values + markers (e.g. 'auto_generate_lp_number'=true [UNIVERSAL]).

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/src/schema/warehouse-settings.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_warehouse_settings.sql [create]
- packages/db/seed/warehouse-settings-defaults.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/warehouse-settings.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the migration runs and seed executes for a fresh tenant, when SELECT FROM warehouse_settings, then 32 default rows are returned.
2. Given a duplicate (tenant, warehouse, key) insert, when committed, then DB raises a unique violation.
3. Given the test reads default 'expiry_warning_days_red', when parsed as JSON, then it equals 7 per §16.1.

## Test strategy
- RED: warehouse-settings.test.ts asserts seed count and value defaults match §16.1.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test warehouse-settings`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not omit any §16.1 toggle.
- Do not change defaults from PRD values.
- Do not implement settings UI (T-074).
